command.name: Gleaming Spiral
effects: Each round, has a 25% chance to reduce Fire Damage Dealt by 15% for 1 round for all enemies that deal Fire Damage.
On rounds 1, 2, 3, 5, and 8, deals Tactical Damage to all enemies that deal Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks at a +45% Damage Rate.
At 6 or more stars, on rounds 1, 2, 3, 5, and 8, deals Physical Damage to 2 enemies in any lane at a +20% Damage Rate. This rises to +30% on round 5 and +40% on round 8.

displayed_values.tactical_damage_targeting: All enemies that deal Physical Damage excluding Basic Attacks

definitions.tactical_damage_scaling: Tactical Damage is increased by Arulix's Instinct and mitigated by the target's Intelligence.
definitions.physical_damage_scaling: Physical Damage is increased by Arulix's Strength and mitigated by the target's Instinct.

habits.name: Hypnotic Helix
habits.effect: On rounds 1, 3, 6, and 8, has a chance to Overwhelm one enemy in any lane for 2 rounds, prioritizing Fire Damage dealers. On rounds 2, 4, 7, and 9, has a chance to Stagger one enemy in any lane for 2 rounds, prioritizing Physical Damage dealers.

definitions.overwhelm: Prevents the target from using Active Commands and Habits on its turn.
definitions.stagger: Prevents the target from using Attack Modifier Commands or launching Basic Attacks on its turn.

habits.display_note: The effect description rounds the current chance to 13%, while the level-1 table displays 12.5%. Both displayed values are preserved.

habits.name: Battle Cunning
habits.effect: At the start of combat, reduce Strength and Intelligence, enhanced by Arulix's Instinct, for all 3 enemies until the end of combat.

habits.name: Spiral Surge
habits.effect: On rounds 1, 2, 3, 5, and 8, deal Physical Damage to 2 enemies in any lane. Damage is multiplied by 1.5 on round 5 and by 2 on round 8.

habits.name: Iron Shell
habits.effect: At the start of combat, reduce non-Basic-Attack Physical Damage Received and Fire Damage Received for 2 other allies in any lane until the end of combat.
habits.display_note: The effect description displays -2%, while the level-1 table displays -2.5%. Both displayed values are preserved.

habits.name: Mimicry
habits.effect: At the start of each round, if any ally is afflicted with Weakened or Vulnerable, has a chance to apply the same effect to 1 enemy in any lane for 2 rounds. If any enemy has Advantage or Resistance, has a chance to apply the same effect to 1 ally in any lane for 2 rounds.
